body_preview: - Trajectory log feedback (Day 130): "shell tool commands failed during the session -> prefer bounded commands with explicit paths and inspect exit output before retrying broader checks" - `targeted_recovery_hint` in `src/tool_wrappers.rs:994` covers 7 bash failure classes (exit code, timeout, spawn, file-not-found, permission-denied, command-not-found, gene
expected_evidence: `src/tool_wrappers.rs` appears in task lineage as the sole changed file Future bash failures matching "argument list too long" or "broken pipe" produce targeted hints instead of the generic fallback Implementation Notes: Add the new branches before the generic fallback `else` at line 1044, so specific patterns match before the catch-all Match on `msg_lower.c
title: Add recovery hint for "argument list too long" and "broken pipe" bash failures
